summary: Tested Waves feature (TikTok/Reels style short-form video). All backend APIs working (15/15 tests pass). Frontend UI verified: Waves tab appears between For You and Following, WavesFeed component displays waves, Create Wave FAB opens upload modal with 60-second limit enforcement.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in waves.py: Changed 'author.verified' to 'author.is_verified' to match Profile model field name
GET /api/waves returns proper structure with waves array, total, has_more
Waves tab correctly positioned between 'For You' and 'Following' tabs
Create Wave modal shows proper video format requirements (MP4, MOV, WebM)
Music label compliance notice displayed (60 seconds max)
seed_data_creation: Created test waves via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Waves feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/waves (feed), POST /api/waves (create), POST /api/upload/wave (video upload), POST /api/waves/{id}/view (record view). Frontend components: WavesFeed.js, CreateWaveModal.js integrated into Feed.js. Database columns content_type, aspect_ratio, view_count added to posts table.

waves_tab_in_feed.description: Waves tab appears between 'For You' and 'Following' tabs

waves_feed_component.description: WavesFeed component displays waves with TikTok-style vertical video UI

get_waves_endpoint.description: GET /api/waves returns proper structure with waves array, total, has_more

create_wave_fab_button.description: Create Wave FAB button appears on Waves tab

create_wave_modal.description: Create Wave modal opens with video upload interface

database_migration.description: Post model has content_type, aspect_ratio, view_count columns

bug_fixed.root_cause: waves.py line 116 used 'author.verified' but Profile model uses 'is_verified'
